THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACE HARDWARE CORP $20,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $100,000.00, WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT,$20,000 TO BE PAYABLE TO CRLA FOUNDATION/CENTER ON RACE, POVERTY AND THE ENVIRONMENT SEE SCANNED DOC FOR ADDITIONAL TERMS.

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-23-2002 IN DEPT. 206, MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT & FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGT; DECLARATION OF DAVID H WILLIAMS IN SUPPORT; POS TO BE HEARD IN DEPT 10 OFF CALENDAR SEE ROA THIS DATE, THIS CASE AND 309176.
